- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

# Product Roadmap
## Q1 Goals
* Improve system latency by 20%.
* Optimize database queries for faster data retrieval.
* Implement code refactoring to enhance overall performance.
## Q2 Goals
* Implement new feature A.
* Develop new feature B.
* Integrate new feature C.
